text.title: prompt-techniques Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for prompt-techniques as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Meta-prompting produces prompts that work on the generating model but underperform on a smaller/different target model
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Prompts optimized for GPT-4o degrade on Haiku or other providers due to model-specific quirks.

failure-mode.description: PromptChain error propagation: an error in step N produces garbage that step N+1 silently accepts, making root cause analysis hard
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each step operates independently without validation of the previous step's output.

failure-mode.description: A/B testing requires a stable evaluator; LLM-as-evaluator is itself non-deterministic and can flip results between runs
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Model outputs vary with temperature, context, and updates.

failure-mode.description: PromptLibrary.format() with {variable} in templates breaks if the input contains literal curly braces — must escape {{ / }}
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Prompt versioning without a test suite is theater; bumping versions without accuracy tracking gives false confidence
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Versions without validation metrics provide no proof of improvement.

failure-mode.description: Variable substitution: PromptLibrary templates use Python .format(); if user input contains {text} literally, it raises KeyError
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Prompt injection via user data: XML tag injection (</document><injection>) in untrusted input can break structured prompts
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wrap user content in a neutral delimiter and strip close-tags before insertion.

failure-mode.description: Chained prompts accumulate latency; a 5-step chain with 2s average latency per step = 10s total
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Subagents should parallelize independent chain branches when possible.

failure-mode.description: PromptABTest winner selection is sensitive to test set size; with <20 test cases, random variance can declare a losing prompt as "winner"
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use at least 50 diverse cases for reliable comparison.
